inline_comments: Edit a message via BlueBubbles API. Requires macOS 13 (Ventura) or higher with Private API enabled.
Unsend (retract) a message via BlueBubbles API. Requires macOS 13 (Ventura) or higher with Private API enabled.
Rename a group chat via BlueBubbles API.
Add a participant to a group chat via BlueBubbles API.
Remove a participant from a group chat via BlueBubbles API.
Leave a group chat via BlueBubbles API.
Set a group chat's icon/photo via BlueBubbles API. Requires Private API to be enabled.
Sanitize filename to prevent multipart header injection (CWE-93)
Add file field named "icon" as per API spec

functions.doc: Remove a participant from a group chat via BlueBubbles API.

functions.doc: Set a group chat's icon via BlueBubbles API.   Requires Private API to be enabled.
